'''gawopo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foaminess|foaminess]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-w-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foaminess|foaminess]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| gawopo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæwepeth|gæwepeth]] || [[word:gæwepej|gæwepej]] || [[word:gæwepesh|gæwepesh]] || [[word:gæwepe|gæwepe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:gawowopoth|gawowopoth]] || [[word:gawowopoj|gawowopoj]] || [[word:gawowoposh|gawowoposh]] || [[word:gawowopo|gawowopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:gawopoth|gawopoth]] || [[word:gawopoj|gawopoj]] || [[word:gawoposh|gawoposh]] || [[word:gawopo|gawopo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:gawofpoth|gawofpoth]] || [[word:gawofpoj|gawofpoj]] || [[word:gawofposh|gawofposh]] || [[word:gawofpof|gawofpof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gawopotho|gawopotho]] || [[word:gawopojo|gawopojo]] || [[word:gawoposho|gawoposho]] || [[word:gawopoko|gawopoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gawopoth|gawopoth]] || [[word:gawopoj|gawopoj]] || [[word:gawoposh|gawoposh]] || [[word:gawopo|gawopo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gawopothol|gawopothol]] || [[word:gawopojol|gawopojol]] || [[word:gawoposhol|gawoposhol]] || [[word:gawopokol|gawopokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gawopothotho|gawopothotho]] || [[word:gawopojojo|gawopojojo]] || [[word:gawoposhosho|gawoposhosho]] || [[word:gawopoko|gawopoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gawopothon|gawopothon]] || [[word:gawopojon|gawopojon]] || [[word:gawoposhon|gawoposhon]] || [[word:gawopokon|gawopokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gawopothoro|gawopothoro]] || [[word:gawopojoro|gawopojoro]] || [[word:gawoposhoro|gawoposhoro]] || [[word:gawopokoro|gawopokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
